title: 100PCS Cosmetic Spatulas, Small Makeup Spatula, Mini Plastic Makeup Scoop for Mixing and Sampling, Skin Care Facial Cream Mask Spatula (Black)
description:
About this item
SKIN-FRIENDLY MATERIAL-Mini Plastic Spatulas are made with the highest quality of polypropylene plastic, they can be easily cleaned and reused! This spoons has smooth surface and does not hurt skin, very suitable for sensitive skin face!
EASY TO CARRY-The size of each spatula is 2.2''*0.5''. The compact size of these spatulas makes them perfect for travel or daily storage! You will get 100 disposable makeup spatulas! Sufficient quantity can meet your daily use and replacement!
SPOON SHAPED SPATULAS-This mini makeup spatula appy spoon shape design, the raised profile allows you to applying the cosmetic. The curved handle provide a comfortable grip. The rounded end make it easier to scoop every last bit of product in a containers, no waste for your cosmetic.
AVOID USING FINGERS-This makeup spatula can take right amount cosmetic out from your jars easily, effectively reduce waste and confusion. Without having your fingers to touch and maintain your cosmetics cleanliness!
A GOOD HELPER FOR BEAUTY-This mini cosmetic spatulas are perfect for dispensing or applying the facial mask, serum, cream and other skincare products; You can easily to apply thin layers of products evenly and sampling your beauty products.
reviews_5s:
Use them to get face moisturizer out of jar. Beauty techs always tell you to never use your finger (bacteria?) I have nails so I always get the cream under my nail vs finger tip.Great little spatulas, good weight plastic and smooth, work well.Perfect for everything Creams Lotions Small jarsI love these little spatulas!! I use them daily when apply my moisturizer!!! I always repurchaseGreat!Perfect for my sample kits!These are wonderful little "spatulas" you can use for everything. If you don't want to get your fingers sticky or stained, these are great. You get a huge bag of them so you don't have to worry about losing one and having to hunt it down. I use them for cold cream and facial moisturizers because I hate the feeling of getting oil and creams under my nails.

These little guys can scoop out the last of the creams, even from the crevices of jars. Once you start using them, you won't want to stop.These little spatulas are perfect! I got the multicolor pack and received about equal numbers of each color, which is greatly appreciated (the last time I got one of these that said "assorted" colors it came with mostly one color). I love these scoops for creams that come in a jar - I don't know why more companies aren't inclucing them with their products, but now I have really cute colors to pick from and won't run out for a LONG time! They are a decent size, and didn't come too sratched up. I like these way more than the other ones I got previosuly. I'm super happy with the colors and mix that I got.For many years I stayed away from using anything in a jar because I didn't feel it was sanitary to keep putting your fingers in it. But I've discovered a lot of products in a jar that i would like to use & these mini-spatulas are an invaluable tool. It is so much more sanitary to use a clean spatula each time. I have sensitive skin, allergies, etc. so it's a necessity not to contaminate the jars.

It's great for moisturizer, lip masks, lip balms, foot creams, etc. So many good products come in jars these days. I'm glad to have found these spatulas and this order is for a large quantity of 100. Should last for a little while. Recommended!I love using mini spatulas in my lotion jars. They keep things sanitary so you are not sticking your fingers in your cosmetic or lotion jars. I find these spoons especially helpful when you get to the bottom of the jar and there's only a little lotion left. The spoons make it easy to scoop up the rest of the product without getting under your fingernails. All of my many jars (travel size and regular size jars) now have these mini spatulas in them. So easy to use, and disposable. I got the multi color spoons so I can easily find it in my jars of face creams and lotions.
